log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Plasmoid — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:20+3=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:12+-2=10 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:9+-2=7 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 2/3 targets affected.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Plasmoid — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:1+9=10 vs AC 14] MISS.
Frost Giant attacks Plasmoid — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:9+9=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 28 damage. Plasmoid — Bardic Musician HP: 39/67
→ Plasmoid — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern! [CON save 10 vs DC 14]
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Plasmoid — Bardic Musician with Greatclub: [d20:8+6=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 13 damage. Plasmoid — Bardic Musician HP: 26/67
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Plasmoid — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:5+3=8 vs DC 16] FAIL!
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre can't reach Plasmoid — Bardic Musician with Greatclub (distance 10ft, range 5ft).
Frost Giant is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Frost Giant WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:13+3=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Plasmoid — Bardic Musician with Greatclub: [d20:4+6=10 vs AC 14] MISS.
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Plasmoid — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:4+3=7 vs DC 16] FAIL! 4 psychic damage. HP: 134/138
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Plasmoid — Bardic Musician.
→ Plasmoid — Bardic Musician healed for 8 HP. HP: 34/67
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Plasmoid — Bardic Musician with Greatclub: [d20:5+6=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Plasmoid — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:6+9=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 24 damage. Plasmoid — Bardic Musician HP: 10/67
→ Plasmoid — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Hold Person! [CON save 10 vs DC 12]
Frost Giant attacks Plasmoid — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:14+9=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 25 damage. Plasmoid — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
